name: Module Mapping
description: Map analyzed requirements to Unity big-event modules and StandardLib support status.
goal: Output each feature requirement with mapped activity modules, StandardLib support, missing items, and risks.
quality: Every module must explain its purpose.
Every module must declare expected inputs and outputs.
Every module must mark whether StandardLib support already exists.
Missing modules must list implementation risk.
Reward systems must be split into login, milestone, and ranking modules when applicable.
